registration_query.query: ("large language model" OR LLM) AND (agent OR autonomous) AND (benchmark OR evaluation)

registration_query.note: Bulk export not used per protocol; count registered alongside Tier-1, not summed into dedup math.

bot_detection_episode.what: Rapid batch of 10 probe searches triggered ScienceDirect rate-limiting ('There was a problem providing the content you requested').
bot_detection_episode.first_batch_results: INVALID (error pages misread as zero counts); discarded
bot_detection_episode.resolution: No bypass attempted. Waited for block to clear, re-ran probes one query per ~15s; all values below are from the slow, valid pass.

interpretation.key_finding: ScienceDirect indexes many works CITING the canonical agent benchmarks but hosts none of the benchmark papers themselves (they are arXiv/ACL/NeurIPS-published). The probe gap versus the expanded source union remains 0: OpenAlex contains every probe benchmark any probed source returns.
interpretation.capture_recapture_with_sd: Declined: probe overlap m=0 with OpenAlex on the probe set and the same-population assumption is violated (Elsevier journals do not host this literature class). Marked UNRESOLVED:zero_overlap_same_population_violated.
interpretation.label: estimate-supporting evidence; probe column verified via live authenticated UI
